name: kalera-claude-code
description: The complete Claude Code toolkit — everything-claude-code foundation (battle-tested agents, skills, hooks, rules) + Munin long-term memory system. One installer. Everything you need.

metadata.description: Complete Claude Code toolkit with Munin memory system

plugins.name: kalera-claude-code
plugins.description: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin — 31 agents, 142 skills, 50 commands, and production-ready hooks. Built on affaan-m/everything-claude-code (50K+ stars, Anthropic hackathon winner). Covers TDD, security scanning, code review, multi-language support, and continuous learning.

plugins.name: munin-claude-code
plugins.description: Munin long-term memory system for Claude Code. Automatic context loading at session start, GraphRAG memory search, error catalog, and per-project memory. Powered by munin.kalera.app.
